zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Bruley於1270年出生在英國武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Henry de Bruley27歲，母親Katherine Foliot23歲。他於1324年與Beatrice de Beauchamp在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Bruley于1270年出生在英国武斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Henry de Bruley27岁，母亲Katherine Foliot23岁。他于1324年与Beatrice de Beauchamp在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1359年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Brûlé (see Brule ). This surname is also found in Britain, where it is of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Brule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fernand, Lucien, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Monique, Normand, Phillippe, Pierre, Raoul, Yvan, Yves.

topographic name for someone living in a place cleared for use by burning, from brûlé ‘burnt’ (Old French bruslé, past participle of brusler ‘to burn’). Some instances of the name may derive from the same word used with reference to disfigurement by burning, either accidentally or as a medieval ordeal or punishment.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Bruley was born in 1270, in Worcestershire, England, his father, Henry de Bruley, was 27 and his mother, Katherine Foliot, was 23. He married Beatrice de Beauchamp in 1324, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1359, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Bruley est né en 1270, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Bruley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Katherine Foliot, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice de Beauchamp en 1324, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1359, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Bruley 1270 in Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Bruley 27 und seine Mutter Katherine Foliot 23. Er hat 1324 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Beatrice de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1359 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bruley è nato il nel 1270 nel Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Bruley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Foliot, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice de Beauchamp nel 1324, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1359, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Bruleyが1270年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Bruleyは27歳，母Katherine Foliotは23歳であった。1324年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでBeatrice de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Bruley(이)가 1270년 영국 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Bruley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Foliot(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Beatrice de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bruley nasceu em 1270, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Bruley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Foliot, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice de Beauchamp em 1324, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1359, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Bruley родился в 1270 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Bruley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Foliot, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice de Beauchamp в 1324 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1359 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Bruley nació en 1270, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Bruley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Katherine Foliot, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Beatrice de Beauchamp en 1324, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1359, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años.
